scripts.build: echo "Do not run root build. Configure Vercel with an app root and run pnpm build, or use pnpm --filter @ams/ams build, pnpm --filter @ams/portal build, or pnpm --filter @ams/api build." && exit 1
scripts.typecheck:all: powershell -NoProfile -Command "pnpm -s tsc -p apps/legacy/tsconfig.json --noEmit; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm -s tsc -p apps/ams/tsconfig.json --noEmit; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm -s tsc -p apps/portal/tsconfig.json --noEmit; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; $env:NODE_ENV='test'; $env:CRON_SECRET='test-cron-secret'; $env:API_INTERNAL_AUTH_SECRET='test-internal-api-secret-with-32-chars'; pnpm -s tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm -s tsc -p packages/application/tsconfig.json --noEmit; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm -s tsc -p packages/auth/tsconfig.json --noEmit; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm -s tsc -p packages/config/tsconfig.json --noEmit; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm -s tsc -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.json --noEmit; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm -s tsc -p packages/db/tsconfig.json --noEmit; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm -s tsc -p packages/domain/tsconfig.json --noEmit; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm -s tsc -p packages/observability/tsconfig.json --noEmit; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm -s tsc -p packages/permissions/tsconfig.json --noEmit"
scripts.test:all: powershell -NoProfile -Command "pnpm test; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm --dir apps/api test; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm --dir apps/ams test; if ($LASTEXITCODE) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pnpm --dir apps/portal test"
scripts.build:deployables: pnpm --filter @ams/ams build && pnpm --filter @ams/portal build && pnpm --filter @ams/api build
scripts.drizzle:generate: pnpm --dir packages/db exec drizzle-kit generate --config drizzle.config.ts
scripts.drizzle:migrate: pnpm --dir packages/db exec drizzle-kit migrate --config drizzle.config.ts
scripts.drizzle:push: pnpm --dir packages/db exec drizzle-kit push --config drizzle.config.ts
scripts.drizzle:studio: pnpm --dir packages/db exec drizzle-kit studio --config drizzle.config.ts
scripts.drizzle:check: pnpm --dir packages/db exec drizzle-kit check --config drizzle.config.ts
